content.en:
"The Primal Domain is small, and the strength of the physical body is almost ten times that of before!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Now, his strength is placed in the seventh realm, so he can be regarded as truly invincible, even those who have comprehended the strongest mastery of the seven realms are not necessarily stronger than him, unless the other party has also practiced the dimensional domain body.

Of course.

If you can really comprehend the existence of the Supreme Realm, there is a high probability that you will also realize the Six Realms Extreme Absolute Technique in the Sixth Realm, and it can also break the bottleneck of the rule chain, and perhaps there is also a dimensional domain inheritance.

Therefore, his current invincibility is only what he thinks he is invincible, maybe among those forces with the powerhouses of the ninth realm, there is a seventh realm that can surpass him.

However, in the general upper region, he was still nearly invincible in the seventh realm.

After the primordial domain reached the Xiaocheng realm, Ye Tian once again entered the Kunxu Land to collect those healing things.

This time, he was almost invincible, easily slashing those seventh-realm multi-dimensional beings, as long as he didn't encounter the existence of the eighth-realm, he wouldn't be in danger.

Of course, he still hasn't entered the depths of the Kunxu Land, which is extremely dangerous, and he doesn't dare to enter the eighth realm, otherwise he will easily fall and die.

Moreover, there are a lot of resources on the periphery of the Kunxu Land, not only the healing things that the mysterious woman needs, but also a lot of resources to improve her cultivation, as well as some resources that can strengthen the will of the soul.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's net worth became more and more abundant, and he had far surpassed the net worth of the other seventh realms.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the dimensional rules to one hundred and sevenfold.

But at this time, he once again encountered the bottleneck of the rule chain, and no matter how much he tried to comprehend the Primal Star, he couldn't break the bottleneck.

"It seems that you have to comprehend the Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect before you can break the bottleneck!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

So, in the following days, he continued to comprehend the primordial star, but instead of comprehending the rules of the dimension, he tried to create the supreme mastery of the Seven Realms.

He really wanted to comprehend the rules of the One Hundred and Eighth Dimension, and once he did that, he would have the hope of cultivating the Primal Domain Body to the Dacheng realm!

And so.

His copied body was used to comprehend the Primal Star and create the Seven Realms of the Supreme Realm.

Time passes.

One domain after another years have passed.

Finally, after the eight hundred domain yuan years, Ye Tian successfully created the Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect, and he named this Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Sect the Taichu Sword Domain!

The Primal Sword Domain is a technique of attack within the range, but it can also be compressed to form a terrifying sword domain light, and the attack power is very terrifying.

The Primal Sword Domain also contains a trace of the power of the Primordial Star, which is enough to form a slaughtering force against the ordinary Seventh Realm, and if a group of Seventh Realms face the Primordial Sword Domain, they will all be slaughtered in a single thought.

After creating the Primal Sword Domain, Ye Tian's strength undoubtedly skyrocketed.

this day.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the dimensional rules, and then cast the Primal Sword Domain, and then compressed it to form the light of the Sword Domain, instantly slashing towards the dimensional rule chain.

Click!!!!!

The chains of dimensional rules cracked, and then finally shattered under the repeated attacks.

Ye Tian's rule chain bottleneck disappeared, and he could continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian spent a lot of time in the domain element, and finally comprehended the rules of one hundred and eight dimensions.

After that, he began to cultivate the Primal Domain Body with all his might, and once the Primordial Domain Body broke through and reached the Dacheng Realm, he would be truly invincible in the Seventh Realm.

And when the time comes, his combat power will even surpass the ordinary Eighth Realm.

However, it was still very early for him to break through to the eighth realm, because his current cultivation and soul will were still very low, and he was far from being qualified to attack the eighth realm.

But.

He had already found a lot of resources in the Kunxu Land that would help him improve his cultivation, and now his cultivation was also improving rapidly, and it might not be too long before he could improve his cultivation to the middle of the seventh realm.

Some more years have passed.

Ye Tian finally raised the Primal Domain Body to the Dacheng realm, and his strength skyrocketed.

"Dacheng-level Taichu Domain Body, one hundred and sixteen dimensional rules, and I have also created the Seven Realms Supreme Absolute Learning Taichu Sword Domain, my current strength is definitely the real Seven Realms invincible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he focused on collecting resources, multiple replica bodies collected resources in the Kunxu Land, and used a large number of resources to improve his cultivation.

Ye Tian's cultivation was finally promoted to the middle realm of the seventh realm under the supply of massive resources, but the increase in strength was not large, after all, his battle was too strong, and a little improvement in cultivation naturally did not help much, at most it increased by one percent of his combat power.

But Ye Tian is very satisfied, and at his current combat power, he can increase by one percent, which is also very good.

......

The Land of Kunxu.

Ye Tian came to the depths of the Kunxu Land, he was very curious about this place, and he also knew that there were more resources here, and his current strength had skyrocketed, it was no less than the ordinary Eighth Realm, and he was also qualified to enter here to fight for a chance.

After coming to the depths of the Kunxu Land, he found that it was very depressing, and he couldn't help but feel a panic in his heart.

Still, he kept going.

Shout!

A ray of light slashed in an instant, but Ye Tian cast the Primal Void Technique in time, distorting the 267 dimensional void here, and dodging this blow.

Immediately afterwards, he used the Primal Sword Domain, and the terrifying power directly fixed the opponent's figure, making it impossible for the opponent to escape.

Rumble!!!!

A tiny Seventh Realm multidimensional life appeared in his perception, and then it was directly crushed by Ye Tian's Primal Sword Domain, killing it.

"Such a powerful Seventh Realm multi-dimensional life, with that blow just now, it is estimated that those Seventh Realms who have comprehended the supreme mastery of the Seven Realms will not be able to dodge. That is, my dimensional rule realm is high, so I can dodge!" Ye Tian muttered.

I have to admit that the danger in the depths of the Kunxu Land is far from being comparable to the periphery, even he has to be careful, otherwise it is really easy to be attacked and killed.

And soon, he found a lot of good things, there are a lot of resources here, and they are of high grade.

As a result, he continued to plunder the resources here.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a multi-dimensional life of the eighth realm, in fact, he broke into other people's territory, and the multi-dimensional life of the eighth realm was annoyed, and directly attacked and killed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian fought with the other party for a long time, but he didn't help the other party.

And at this very moment.

A cloud of ghost mist appeared, and when he saw this cloud of ghost mist, the multidimensional life of the eighth realm was so frightened that he immediately fled.

Ye Tian also fled immediately, and the eighth realm couldn't bear such a thing as ghost fog.
